title: Algerian Fish Tagine
description: A traditional Algerian dish made with fish and spices, slow-cooked in a flavorful tagine.

ingredients.name: Fish (white fish such as cod or tilapia)

instructions: Rinse the fish and pat it dry with paper towels.
Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the Algerian spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the dates and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until it is cooked through.
Add the white wine and water to the tagine, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 10-15 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with parsley and served with couscous or rice.
